entry.title: Re: Everything you need to know about: SAP SuccessFactors Talent Intelligence Hub
entry.content:
Hi @RinkyKarthik  - Are the 2nd level Managers be able to see the skills of their 2nd level reportees under "Team View"? If so,how?

Thanks,

Avinash

entry.title: Re: Issues with Master Data Transfer from ERP HANA Cloud...
entry.content:
Hi,

Regarding #1, see Transferring a Master Routing, where it reads:

Note
Once you've transferred the master routing, SAP Digital Manufacturing calls the BOM from your SAP S/4HANA Cloud system if at least one component is assigned to the routing step. For more information, see Updating and Upversioning a BOM.
 
So you might want to double check and review both your BOM and Integration setup, including Destination S4H_ODATA_INTEGRATION.
You might also want to evaluate replicating Business Object Type: Production Version of Material from S/4HC to DM, which is part of Production Planning Master Data Integration (SAP_COM_0519).

Regarding #2, this is working by design, as order-specific BOM and Routing are indeed always created for every single new order by design.

Hope it helps,
Manoel

entry.title: Re: Landing of Inbound Delivery in Queue.
entry.content: You can only re-register the queue, which results that all you DLV* queue will be in SMQ2, you need to manually process it. but if you do so, irrespective of OBD/IBD, all the DLV* queue will be in SMQ2. you cannot achieve it by standard. i suggest you to remove your auto distribution if IBD, and you can distribute it manually.

entry.title: Re: SuccessFactors Fun quick tip: Adding HTML code to your Message Definition and Alerts and reduce
entry.content:
Great article, 

A great way to store these images is hosting them on sites like https://postimages.org/.

Also for you to use these trick in email Alerts you have to enable the below check from Company and Logo settings.

entry.title: Upload Fixed Assets for Version 10.0
entry.content:
Hi,

I have the template for OITM and I need to upload fixed assets.

There are 4 fields in OITM on the screen that I need to upload but are not in my template.  How can I get the fields for these files?  I pulled the field names from this web site, it says SQL but shouldnt the field names be the same? https://biuan.com/OITM

I need the field names for row A and row B in DTW.

AcqDate      - Acquisition Date
AsstStatus   - Asset Status
LastPurDat  - Last Purchase Date
LastPurPrc  -  Last Purchase Price

entry.title: Re: Material Codification
entry.content:
Hello @GHASSEN 

You can number materials whichever way you need in S/4HANA. However I would discourage any logic in a material number itself. Such logic will break sooner or latter (been that, done that) and material number can't be changed once created. Instead model family, subfamily etc. with material master attributes or with the classification system.

Also notice that serial number mustn't be part of a material number. A material number identifies a product, whereas a serial number identifies a single piece of the product. Think of your mobile phone - a material number is the phone model e.g. iPhone 15 Pro (for the sake of simplicity, let's leave product version aside), whereas a serial number is the identifier of the individual device that you use (in case of iOS you can find it in Settings -> General -> About -> Serial Number)

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: Reason for mouvement not showing in MIGO Good Issue
entry.content:
I find the solution by adding the field : GRUND for reason for mouvement in 

SAP Customizing Implementation Guide -> Materials Management -> Inventory Management and Physical Inventory -> Settings for Goods Movements (MIGO) -> Field Selection per Movement Type

entry.title: Re: SAC Foreach restricted by time
entry.content:
Hey @MoonJun 

Looks good thank you!

entry.title: DTP failed while loading the data from Query(as infoprovider) to ADSO
entry.content:
Hello,

DTP failed while loading the data from Query(as infoprovider) to ADSO, this was worked fine one time but later it starts giving the below error while extracting data.


An error occurred when getting data from the processor.
Error reading the data of InfoProvider @Q<name of the Query>
Error while extracting from source 003YPSVRR***<Query techname> (type InfoProvider)
Error reading the data of InfoProvider @Q<name of the Query>

Note: 

Transformation and DTP is active, Query is working fine when we run it in RSRT, giving error while loading from DTP Only.
we created few more flows like same but others are working fine except this flow..

please suggest that did i missed something here ? 

thanks in advance.

Regards,

Vasudev.

entry.title: Re: Account 600002 in company code 2014 cannot be directly posted to
entry.content: As the error itself indicates, account 600002 is a reconciliation account and cannot have accounting entries directly in it.

entry.title: Re: Posting Change with RF
entry.content: There is no way of doing posting change in RF, if you want you have to use Custom Enhancement, where you can call FM- /scwm/gm_create, /scwm/gm_post, /scwm/stock_change

entry.title: PR/PO Flexible Workflow with role Assignment
entry.content:
Dear SAP Expert,

I have a requirement to add user's manager to the approval workflow without using the HR module (it's not included in the project).

I tried to handle the requirement using SAP Flexible workflow for PR/PO and i didn't understand how to link the role to the user manager (i'm on the Manage workflow for Purchase requisitions app)

Client doesn't have HR module activated. Do i need to have HR module activated or is there any other standard solution ?

entry.title: Re: Material Codification
entry.content: @GHASSEN best to listen to what Dominik is saying because I've been through that experience also, and there's no reason that can't be baked into classification (or even product hierarchy depending on how you have it structured).

entry.title: I am getting this error during vendor creation, Facing problem in practice server.
Re: OPTIMIZER RUN FAILED DUE TO VSR OPTIMIZER /SCMTMS/PLN_BGD010
entry.content:
Whenever your Optimizer run Fails you always need to check 3 thing.

1. Resource master

2. Lane Master
3. Zone Master

Based on the above 3 things Generally Optimizer fails, possible reason - Cost too high, Couldn't able to find lane/Resource.

entry.title: Re: Chart of Accounts & Assign
entry.content:
Hello Dears 

I`m asking about any possibilities to hide the default COAs by SAP in F4 List? 

any recommendations?

entry.title: Agreement Number VBAK-KNUMA is not updated using ORDERS IDOC
entry.content:
Hello SAP experts,

     I need to update the field VBAK-KNUMA (Agreement number) using an ORDERS IDOC. However, this field is not available for update online using VA01 but IDOC documentation says that it can be updated using segment E1EDK02 segment with qualifier 072 and the agreement no text in E1EDK02-BELNR field. I did that and the sales order was successfully created from the IDOC, however the field VBAK-KNUMA was not updated. 

    Is this because the field VBAK-KNUMA is not available online for updates and hence the function module 'IDOC_INPUT_ORDERS' which is called during processing of the IDOC, doesn't update the fields which are not available for online VA01 update.

Please let me know your opinion on this.

Regards

Anustup Chakrabarti

entry.title: Re: How to do reversal of picking in case of mixed handling Units?
entry.content: Generally Cancel pick meaning removing the delivery link with stock ID and then putback. What you can do a trick, you can open Advance serach button, put the delivery which is linked to one HU and execute, it will fin all the Delivery with 1 hu, goto HU tab and release Stock.

entry.title: Re: Intercompany Posting in S4H Cloud
entry.content:
Hi 

for intercompany elimanation we will require "Partner Company code" maintained.

it is does not flow from business partner 

any suggestion where to configure this ?

entry.title: Re: Landing of Inbound Delivery in Queue.
entry.content:
Hi Jagdeepsingh,
Thank you very much for your reply.
your suggestion had met my requirement.

entry.title: RAP - Mandatory fields Popup
entry.content:
Hi, I have a question. I have application with mandatory field and dialog popup show correctly. But I have a problem with button Craete becouse if I don't press button GO before Button Create is not open form for new record. Do you heve any idea?

Thanks

entry.title: Re: FI_TAX_SERVICES_CALCULATE
entry.content:
@raymond_giuseppi

I called method fi_tax_services=>calculate as you suggested.

The behavior of the method and FB60 is different for the following scenario:

  1. There is a vendor line without tax code (MWSKZ is initial)
  2. There is a GL line without tax code (MWSKZ is initial)
  3. 'calculate tax' is checked

 

The method updates the tax code to a value that means no tax.

FB60 raises a blocking  error: 'G/L account xxxxxx requires a valid tax code'

 How can I force the method to behave as standard?

The call to the method is:

  CALL METHOD fi_tax_services=>calculate
    EXPORTING
      documentheader    = gs_doc_header
      accountpayable    = gt_accountpayable
      accountreceivable = gt_accountreceivable
*     distribute_deduct = SPACE
*     taxamount         =
    IMPORTING
      return_code       = lv_subrc
    CHANGING
      currencyamount    = gt_currencyamount
      accountgl         = gt_accountgl
      accounttax        = gt_accounttax
      return            = lt_return.

Thankyou in advance

Hagit

entry.title: Inventory opening balance - do not show as OB in TB
entry.content:
Dears , 

I have upload Inventory opening balance from opening balances screen on 1/8/2024 which is that start if fiscal year.

but in the TB report it shows under debit not OB , if i change the date to 02/8 , it will start showing as OB , as there is anyway to fix this ?

 

Regards.

entry.title: Re: My Inbox -- Substitute Approver
entry.content: Hello , How to check wether a subsititute is assigned or not for users

entry.title: Re: Agreement Number VBAK-KNUMA is not updated using ORDERS IDOC
entry.content: I don't see qualifier '072' read in the processing of 'IDOC_INPUT_ORDERS', but you also won't be able to update it via IDoc if you cannot update it in VA01.

entry.title: How to get Number of Pay Periods
entry.content: Trying to write a business rule for a custom mdf and part of that would require duration of time spent in a program code and then looks at a lookup table for a dollar value.   My business rule is working properly by using Get Number of Calendar Days, however since we are paid semi-monthly that results in variations.  Has anyone created a lookup table to count the number of pay periods between two dates?

entry.title: Re: Agreement Number VBAK-KNUMA is not updated using ORDE...
entry.content: Thanks and yes, that was my opinion too that if the field is not available in VA01, IDOC update wont be possible.

entry.title: Re: Adobe forms - hide field, move fields up
entry.content:
FormPurchaseOrderRequest.Main.Invoice.Table1.Row1.Table4[1].Row1.Cell2::initialize - (JavaScript, client)
if ($record.PurchaseOrder.BuyerParty.BuyerID.value != null && $record.PurchaseOrder.BuyerParty.BuyerID.value != '') {
// Actions to take when BuyerID has a value
this.presence = "hidden"; // Example: Hiding the current object if BuyerID has a value
} else {
// Actions to take when BuyerID does NOT have a value (either null or empty)
this.presence = "visible"; // Example: Making the current object visible if BuyerID does not have a value
}

Use This  type of code its will Work I think.....

entry.title: LMS: Report to see when a user first accessed (started) an online item
entry.content:
Hi,

Is there a report to show when a user first accessed (or started) an online item?

I can find when it was assigned via the Learning Needs report and when they completed it via an Online Item Status report, but I cannot see anywhere to get the date/time it was first accessed/started.

I have looked in Story Reports as well and cannot find a table with the relevant fields.

Thanks for your help.

Julia

entry.title: 30-candidates profile Deadline Enforced in SAP SuccessFactors Recruiting
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I’m looking for clarification on the application process within SAP SuccessFactors Recruiting. I’ve heard that there might be a 30-day deadline after profile creation for submitting a job application.

He/ She has only 30 days after creation of the profile that he needs to apply for a job and after this period success factors send mail to the candidate to reactivate the profile again how I can make this cycle using business rule

entry.title: Re: how to print handling units in custom physical inventory form in EWM
entry.content: The PI form can be printed upon creation on WO, each PI which you create will generate the WO. you should develop a form, custom PPF for the WO based on your condition, and maintain the condition table, once you do it, each WO for PI the system will call the PPF and that will call your form.

entry.title: Re: Source DMIS 2011 SP27 - repl. server DMIS 2011 SP16 compatibility
entry.content: Hello, I'm confirming with development and will get back to you as soon as I receive a response.

entry.title: Aborted TWB-Job SMT_BATCH_EXECUTE
entry.content:
Hi All,

 

When we are trying to execute out test scripts via job in SolMan system but it is giving me a timeout error after 1.801 sec. The Job RSTWB_BG_TSTPRX_COLLECT is throwing the below error.

 

"Start timeout reached - TWB-Job: SMT_BATCH_EXECUTE
Aborted TWB-Job SMT_BATCH_EXECUTE"

 

I have also set the parameter TSTPRX_CENTRAL_COLL as per the Note 2299335, though we are in latest SolMan version of 7.2 SP18. Could somebody help to resolve this issue.

entry.title: Re: Warehouse Picking by 2 workers
entry.content: If the activity area is different then use PICK-PACK-PASS process. meaning picking form one area by one picker, and upon completion next subsequent WO will open for picking and the other worker take the Hu and complete it.

entry.title: Re: 30-candidates profile Deadline Enforced in SAP SuccessFactors Recruiting
entry.content: Please don't post to Questions about SAP Websites (issue with community Website, etc.) if it's a question about SAP software. Instead, ask in Technology Q&A: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/qa-p/technology-questions. Hopefully someone will fix it for you.

entry.title: Excise tax configuration guide
entry.content:
Hello All,

 

Looking for condition based excise tax configuration guide for India including reports.

 

Thanks,

Shamiulla.

entry.title: How to Prevent Deletion of Input Controls in Webi Reports While Allowing Usage?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

In a webi report with a group of input controls, I’ve applied the sap note: 1937176 - How to grant filtering functionality for Web Intelligence reports without enabling the Design application mode? With that note, my users can consume the input controls and only can access the report in reading mode.

Now besides of it, the extra requirement is to avoid that users can delete (suppress) the input controls, e.g., that can consume/use the input controls but not to delete them.

System version: BusinessObjects 4.3 SP2 P7 14.3.2.4385

Any advice to accomplish this? Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: SAC Foreach restricted by time
entry.content:
@MoonJun 

I have always had hard time with variables as they are additive and do not get cleared when next record arrives. I had first written my code using variables but I think I was having issues with them getting cleared ( may be I made mistakes as I wrote in hurry). Could you try changing the project life of second project from first year to some other year ( different than 1st project) and see if your code still works.

 

Nikhil

entry.title: Bill of exchange
entry.content:
Hello All,

 

Could anyone please help with bill of exchange dishonour case with what step need to be performed in FBZG.

Whether any preconfiguration need to be done for DME for FBZG.

 

Thanks,

Shamiulla.

entry.title: Re: RF: Verification profile settings for picking
entry.content: You can create your own Warehouse-Specific Verification control- Path- SPRO-SCM Extended Warehouse Management - Extended Warehouse Management - Mobile Data Entry - Verification Control - Define Warehouse-Specific Verification &&&Define Warehouse-Specific Verification Determination-------- assign it to your activity and combination with WO no

entry.title: Re: Error no. L9029 is raised during qRFC processing from EWM
entry.content: Did you check below configuration and have defined the movement type- (your mvt type) in WM IMG > LE > WM > Interfaces > IM > define movement types WM have its own movement types then Inventory management of MM.

entry.title: Re: How to Use Custom Fields for Pricing in Sales Documents
entry.content:
Hi @CE6 ,

Im my case we have extended only the Business Context: Sales: Pricing Communication Head (SD_PRICECOMHEAD) with required custom fields. 

Now to map the data for these custom fields in KOMK structure do we have any BADI available or we need to use the FORM USEREXIT_PRICING_PREPARE_TKOMK ?

As i have not extended the business scenario 'Sales Document to Pricing Communication on Item Level' how to map the data in KOMK structure? 

Thanks,

Kiran

entry.title: Re: My Object Page V4 is empty , except Header. Even i ca...
entry.content:
Hi @junwu  , I used Annotation #LINEITEM_REFERENCE , still I can't see anything , Could you please help me.

Below is my Metadata extension with the above annotation added. Please correct me where the problem is. 

One more thing , is the kind of PACKAGE to which we saved also effect the object page ? I have saved my changes to a Super package, means under which childs will be there. 

 

@Metadata.layer: #CORE

 

@ui: { headerInfo:{

typeName: 'Mapping Table',

typeNamePlural: 'Mapping Table',

title: {

type: #STANDARD,

label: 'Mapping Table',

value: 'Companycode'

},

description.value: 'Companycode' }

}

 

 

 

@Search.searchable: true

annotate view ZC_BIMAMAPPING

with

{

 

@ui.facet: [{ id: 'Mapping Data',

purpose: #STANDARD,

type: #LINEITEM_REFERENCE,

label: 'Mapping Details',

targetQualifier: 'LineItems',

position: 10 } ]

 

@ui: { lineItem: [{ position: 10 }],

identification: [{ position: 10 }],

selectionField: [{ position: 10 }] ,

identification: [{qualifier: 'LineItems'}] }

 

@EndUserText.label: 'Company Code'

Companycode;

 

@ui: { lineItem: [{ position: 20 }],

identification: [{ position: 20 }],

selectionField: [{ position: 20 }],

identification: [{qualifier: 'LineItems'}] }

 

@EndUserText.label: 'Mapping Type'

Maptype;

 

@ui: { lineItem: [{ position: 30 }],

identification: [{ position: 30 }],

selectionField: [{ position: 30 }],

identification: [{qualifier: 'LineItems'}] }

@Search.defaultSearchElement: true

 

@EndUserText.label: 'Source Value'

Sourcevalue;

 

@ui: { lineItem: [{ position: 40 }],

identification: [{ position: 40 }],

identification: [{qualifier: 'LineItems'}]}

 

@EndUserText.label: 'Target Value'

Targetvalue;

 

@ui: {

identification: [{ position: 50 }] ,

identification: [{qualifier: 'LineItems'}] }

 

@EndUserText.label: 'Created By'

created_by;

 

@ui: {

identification: [{ position: 60 }] ,

identification: [{qualifier: 'LineItems'}] }

 

@EndUserText.label: 'Created At'

created_at;

 

@ui: {

identification: [{ position: 70 }] ,

identification: [{qualifier: 'LineItems'}] }

 

@EndUserText.label: 'Last Changed By'

last_changed_by;

 

@ui: {

identification: [{ position: 80 }] ,

identification: [{qualifier: 'LineItems'}] }

 

@EndUserText.label: 'Last Changed At'

last_changed_at;

 

//@UI.hidden: true

//ExcelRowNumber;

 

}

entry.title: Re: Task 2 - CDS View Entity Associations ( August Developer Challenge )
entry.content: Task2 done!

entry.title: Re: Entering SAP Signavio certification
entry.content: Do you also have some Certification Werkshops for Business Process Manager in the Pipeline?

entry.title: Re: Possibility to block users using old SAP GUI version
entry.content: You can use the approach outlined in SAP Note 748424 - "Evaluation of SAP GUI versions and patches" to determine the version used to connect and can then decide what to do.

entry.title: Gross profit Base Price not showing
entry.content:
I hope this message finds you well. We've encountered an intermittent issue with our SAP software regarding the visibility of purchase price data. As it's sporadic, it's been challenging to pinpoint the exact cause.

 

Problem Description:

 

At irregular intervals, purchase price data entered into the software does not appear in the system.

Users report that despite correctly inputting purchase price information during data entry, there are instances where this data does not display in the SAP software interface or reports.

The inconsistency of this issue makes it difficult to predict.

 

 

I hope this message finds you well. We've encountered an intermittent issue with our SAP software regarding the visibility of purchase price data. As it's sporadic, it's been challenging to pinpoint the exact cause.

 

Problem Description:

 

At irregular intervals, purchase price data entered into the software does not appear in the system.

Users report that despite correctly inputting purchase price information during data entry, there are instances where this data does not display in the SAP software interface or reports.

The inconsistency of this issue makes it difficult to predict.

entry.title: Re: COLUMN NAMES STRIPPING AFTER 30 CHARs when replicating SAP HANA DB as source SAP SLT
entry.content: Hello, please see KBA https://launchpad.support.sap.com/#/notes/2727771

entry.title: Re: EWM LOSC - how to choose any source HU
entry.content: SAP Standard System will always create WT with some Stock, you can do RF enhancement, using Wrapper FM, where you can put one button, and upon click as user to scan any HU, it will link the current HU to the DLV and old link for Stock ID will go off. this is the only possible solution i can think of.

entry.title: I’m looking for clarification on the application process within SAP SuccessFactors Recruiting. I’ve
entry.content:
I’m looking for clarification on the application process within SAP SuccessFactors Recruiting. I’ve heard that there might be a 30-day deadline after profile creation for submitting a job application.

He/ She has only 30 days after creation of the profile that he needs to apply for a job and after this period success factors send mail to the candidate to reactivate the profile again how I can make this cycle using business rule

entry.title: Re: Possibility to block users using old SAP GUI version
entry.content:
You can use the approach outlined in SAP Note 748424 - "Evaluation of SAP GUI versions and patches" to determine the version used to connect and can then decide what to do (like aborting the log on and displaying a dialog box to the user). I have seen such approaches a couple of times already. The code needs to be developed by you.
However, my preference would generally be to do this rather via a software inventory and push updates to users who have older versions of SAP GUI installed.

Best regards,
Frank

entry.title: Re: New or not to the SAP Community, share your story!
entry.content:
Hi @MayarHassan- welcome!! In addition to what @EslamSalah has recommended - please also feel free to view the following recommendations:

  • Join the Beginner Corner
  • Join the SAP Learning group
  • SAP Managed Tags (subscribe to your topic areas of interest)

Best of luck!

entry.title: Re: Can customers expand default memory size?
entry.content: The table you extracted for the GROW Service Use Description applies to S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.  We offer a maximum memory specification based on the number of full use equivalent users (FUEs) as outlined in that table. Customers can buy system extensions in cases where they have or plan to exceed that maximum memory allocation.  These are sold in 128GB increments and can be sold to customer who bought GROW with S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition base or premium.

entry.title: Re: DTP failed while loading the data from Query(as infoprovider) to ADSO
entry.content:
Hello Vasudev. It is just a first idea... have you checked all the criteria listed here?

https://help.sap.com/doc/saphelp_nw75/7.5.5/en-US/4b/c347cd494650e9e10000000a15822b/content.htm?no_cache=true

Maybe some technical restriction prevents it?

BR, Martin

entry.title: Re: Problem Flexible Billing Document Numbering not provi...
entry.content:
Hi,

The assignment is done, but still gives the same error:

Can you help us?

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Re: I am getting this error during vendor creation, Facing problem in practice server.
entry.content: Check transaction FK08 or FK09

entry.title: Re: SAP HANA Express: SAP XSA installation failed
entry.content:
@Dan_vL 

Thanks for answered,

i think the setted hostname caused the error. Inititally i used the proposed name, which is my environment and it was not added to /etc/hosts.

After choose a new hostname and setup in the /etc/hosts the installation was successfully.

entry.title: Re: Showing the Currency type and rates in a SAC Story
entry.content: Only with inconvenient workarounds & at your own risk: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/leverage-data-export-service-to-view-currency-table-data/ba-p/13756442

entry.title: ALV CONTROLL TREE
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

As shown in the image, I am facing a problem that I would like to solve:

When I select the values C1 and C2 either by marking them or by checking the checkboxes and then click on the "Delete" button, the rows A1 and B1 are unfortunately also counted in the background.

Normally, I use the methods GET_CHECKED_ITEMS and GET_SELECTED_NODES from the class CL_GUI_ALV_TREE_SIMPLE. However, the EXPORTING parameters of these methods return the wrong index. In my example, the values C1 and C2 are assigned indices 3 and 4, respectively, because the rows A and B1 are also counted in the background.

Therefore, I am asking for your help in solving this issue.

Thank you in advance.

Radouane

entry.title: Failed to load component for container - ModuleError: failed to load
entry.content:
Hi all,

I'm experiencing an issue with loading a component in my SAPUI5 application. The error message I'm seeing is:

"Failed to load component for container - ModuleError: failed to load 'employeeapplication/SharedBlocks/PersonalDetails.js' from ./SharedBlocks/PersonalDetails.js: script load error"

My manifest.json file looks like this:

{
  "_version": "1.59.0",
  "sap.app": {
    "id": "employeeapplication",
    "type": "application",
    "i18n": "i18n/i18n.properties",
    "applicationVersion": {
      "version": "0.0.1"
    },
    "title": "{{appTitle}}",
    "description": "{{appDescription}}",
    "resources": "resources.json",
    "sourceTemplate": {
      "id": "@sap/generator-fiori:basic",
      "version": "1.14.1",
      "toolsId": "9e31bfee-31bb-417f-bee7-4d3c1801703c"
    },
    "dataSources": {
      "mainService": {
        "uri": "/sap/opu/odata/sap/ZUI_C_PNL/",
        "type": "OData",
        "settings": {
          "annotations": [],
          "localUri": "localService/metadata.xml",
          "odataVersion": "2.0"
        }
      }
    },
    "crossNavigation": {
      "inbounds": {
        "zpc_emp-display": {
          "semanticObject": "zpc_emp",
          "action": "display",
          "title": "{{flpTitle}}",
          "signature": {
            "parameters": {},
            "additionalParameters": "allowed"
          }
        }
      }
    }
  },
  "sap.ui": {
    "technology": "UI5",
    "icons": {
      "icon": "",
      "favIcon": "",
      "phone": "",
      "phone@2": "",
      "tablet": "",
      "tablet@2": ""
    },
    "deviceTypes": {
      "desktop": true,
      "tablet": true,
      "phone": true
    }
  },
  "sap.ui5": {
    "flexEnabled": true,
    "dependencies": {
      "minUI5Version": "1.121.6",
      "libs": {
        "sap.m": {},
        "sap.ui.core": {},
        "sap.f": {},
        "sap.suite.ui.generic.template": {},
        "sap.ui.comp": {},
        "sap.ui.generic.app": {},
        "sap.ui.table": {},
        "sap.ushell": {}
      }
    },
    "contentDensities": {
      "compact": true,
      "cozy": true
    },
    "models": {
      "i18n": {
        "type": "sap.ui.model.resource.ResourceModel",
        "settings": {
          "bundleName": "employeeapplication.i18n.i18n"
        }
      },
      "": {
        "dataSource": "mainService",
        "preload": true,
        "settings": {}
      }
    },
    "resources": {
      "css": [
        {
          "uri": "css/style.css"
        }
      ],
      "js": [
        {
          "uri": "SharedBlocks/PersonalDetails.js"
        }
      ]
    },
    "blocks": {
      "uri": "SharedBlocks/",
      "blocks": {
        "PersonalDetails": {
          "uri": "SharedBlocks/PersonalDetails.js"
        }
      }
    },  
    "routing": {
      "config": {
        "routerClass": "sap.m.routing.Router",
        "viewType": "XML",
        "async": true,
        "viewPath": "employeeapplication.view",
        "controlAggregation": "pages",
        "controlId": "app",
        "clearControlAggregation": false
      },      
      "routes": [
        {
          "name": "Home",
          "pattern": "",
          "target": [
            "TargetEmployeeData"
          ]
        },
        {
          "name": "detail",
          "pattern": "product/{Empid}",
          "target": [
            "Targetpnl"
          ]
        },
        {
          "name": "create_personal_details",
          "pattern": "create",
          "target": [
            "Targetcreatepnl"
          ]
        }
       
      ],
      "targets": {
        "TargetEmployeeData": {
          "viewType": "XML",
          "transition": "slide",
          "clearControlAggregation": false,
          "viewName": "EmployeeData"
        },
        "Targetpnl": {
          "viewType": "XML",
          "transition": "slide",
          "clearControlAggregation": false,
          "viewName": "pnl"
        },
        "Targetcreatepnl": {
          "viewType": "XML",
          "transition": "slide",
          "clearControlAggregation": false,
          "viewName": "createpnl"
        }
       
      }
    },
    "rootView": {
      "viewName": "employeeapplication.view.App",
      "type": "XML",
      "async": true,
      "id": "App"
    }
  },
  "sap.cloud": {
    "public": true,
    "service": "employeeapplication"
  }
}


And my PersonalDetails.js file looks like this:

sap.ui.define([
"sap/ui/core/UIComponent"
], function(UIComponent) {
"use strict";

return UIComponent.extend("employeeapplication.SharedBlocks.PersonalDetails", {
metadata: {
properties: {
// your properties here
}
},

init: function() {
// your initialization code here
}
});
});

 

error in console  I am facing .

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA for Product Compliance: doubts with a Sup...
entry.content:
Hello

regarding your questions 

Question 1: How can I assure Supplier's compliance, considering that SAP doesn't always provide (all) legal requirements for checks for a certain country and/or a region in a country (in the example above, SAP doesn't provide any of Morocco's legal requirements and for Spain, it just provides nation-wide requirements but not regional ones).

My answer would be: you need "just" to wait. SAP is on the track to activate more and more requirements (and prepare the needed data structure and integrate it in the process).

If you have the feeling something is missing (now and / or in the future): I propose that you get in touch with SAP. There is a "Co Innovation / Customer Egnagement" running with many companies. If needed: you can raise there your concern / wishes for the future of this software

Question 2: In the case that I have all legal requirements for checks, is it enough to assess product marketability in each country and perform just one supplier's compliance check, regarding that I have created adequate compliance purposes (like one for each country)?

Regarding this question i would like to differenttiate.

The "new" approach of Product Compliance is 100% different to the old one. You need to "assess" only those business cases which are "active" (at least one e.g. purchase order, sales order, delivery etc.) should have happend. You need not to think about "the world" at the beginning

This is the biggest change in "thinking" (and using a SAP software).

In a nutshell: yes you can try to support the "world" but why considering a business case which will not come ?

E.g. may be you never sell to Tansanisa, Kenia etc. (ok not many regulations there.. )

But you need may b to differentiate. If you still use "EHS Classic" i hope that you still have acquired lot of data. So why should you not "migrate" the data (even if you to not may be not need it at the beginning)

Wish you the best

C.B.

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA for Product Compliance: doubts with a Sup...
entry.content: Thank you for your comments, Christoph, as always, they are insightful and helpful!

entry.title: Re: SAP BW on HANA data tiering
entry.content:
Hello @ding_ye 

I cannot provide official/secured information... but maybe you can investigate yourself into the direction if Sybase IQ is also useful for data tiering in an embedded BW.

For regular BW on or 4/HANA it is clear... but for S4, I don't know.

You can start with these blogs:

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/sap-sybase-iq-the-hidden-treasure/ba-p/13440592 

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/sap-nls-solution-for-sap-bw-4-all-releases/ba-p/13303313 

BR, Martin

entry.title: Re: How to generate manager list from specific company when manager is out of these company?
entry.content: using User entity & calculated field (for each entity direct reports if company = A field value = 1 + Field value, i'm able to list all managers with reports in company A. i need to figure out with an MDF object how to cover to delete manager permission for managers who become managers without reports in company A. ( i need to figure out how to detect when the count of reports in company A is moving from a positive number (1 or higher) to zero

entry.title: Planned order created from sales order even if there is a production order.
entry.content:
Hi,

This is a scenario

there is a long production order 27.09.24 - 30.09.24

there is a sales order requirement date 29.09.24

because of production order is long it actually will have needed quantity for 29.09.24 but when we run MRP it still creates smaller qty planned order to actually meet demand date of sales order.

i do understand why its happening but need to know how i could avoid this additional planned order. what setting i could try change.

entry.title: Re: Price items in Service Transactions
entry.content: Thanks! Very good document, for case 1, Is event based revenue recognition is mandatory? If not, how to recognize revenue?

entry.title: Web IDE Could not deploy the builder MTA.
entry.content:
I try my first Hello World within the Web IDE (Hana Express, XSA). This fails with known error: 2938966 - Unable to deploy di-space-enablement-ui

Now, the doc offer solution, which i don't understand:
"1. Check the domain already set:"

 

 

> hostname -f
<localhostname>.<localdomain>

 

 

 

  • Where i has to execute this command?
  • In my termal as root or in the xsa console as xsa_admin/hxeadm?

Update
exceute the command return following hostname

 

 

hxeadm@rammi-laptop-i7:/usr/sap/HXE/HDB90> hostname -f
rammi-laptop-i7

 

 

  • which %host%.* i have to use? 

Update #2
I don't no if the xscontroller.ini is part of the solution, but here is my configuration:
 

 

# xscontroller.ini last modified CEST 2024-08-19 09:49:44:619 by XS advanced

[communication]
default_domain = hana-express.local
# api_url is auto-generated during xscontroller startup. Please do not edit manually!
api_url = https://hana-express.local:39030

[general]
embedded_execution_agent = true

 

Please help me out to understand this Knowledge

entry.title: VBAP_FIXMG getting wrong update in sales order
entry.content:
Dear Experts,        

     In sales order doucument change list, delivery date and qty fixed changed(vbap-fixmg)  should have old value:X, new value:“” (or  old value:”” new value:X) for adjacent change for talbe field vbap-fixmg.

      I meet a problem of change log upating error,   which has several same new value for vbap-fixmg with changes next the each other, refer to the screen shotcut.

      

    And I found that even though the change log  for vbap-fixmg  with new value X, the talbe field fixmg in table vbap was still “”.

    hope experts here can give me some help ,thanks very much!

entry.title: Re: run time error while execute the program
entry.content: Please ask a new question instead of reviving an old message about Unicode and structure definition compatibilities.

entry.title: Assignment field in Group Reporting
entry.content:
Hi expert,

When we release Universal Journal from ACDOCA to ACDOCU, we have seen than Assignment data are already import, without any aggregation, at the end, we have a lot of useless information in Group Reporting ACDOCU, with many million rows for one company / conso unit.

How we can skip the assignmenent field and keep only the aggregation in when we release the Universal Journal?

Kind regards,

 

Maxime

entry.title: Managing PFAS with SAP: Unlock Your Data Treasures
entry.content:
If you run SAP ERP and want to tackle PFAS, we have excellent news: your SAP system offers a wealth of treasures – data and information - that you can use:  

  • It records what you purchase, produce, store, and sell.
  • It knows which components in what quantities make up your products.
  • It tells you what you buy from whom.  

Discover how to unlock SAP data using an integrated and sustainable approach to handle PFAS. For insights into current PFAS regulations and their implications for your business, don't miss our initial article about PFAS Regulations and Business Challenges in the series Managing PFAS with SAP. 

SAP’s Answer to PFAS Business Challenges

Utilizing the right resources in your SAP system guarantees progress in tackling the following core business challenge:

Maintaining records of PFAS compliance efforts.This facilitates regulatory audits and ensures adherence to legal obligations.
Identification of PFAS-containing materials throughout the supply chain.This facilitates risk assessment, substitution planning, and collaboration with suppliers.
Creation of a PFAS inventory.This facilitates tracking and reporting of PFAS-related metrics and enhances transparency.

Your SAP system can support the entire product lifecycle. This includes tracking PFAS in products, monitoring PFAS exposure during the manufacturing process or managing PFAS waste. This blog post focuses only on the aspect of product compliance.

Access the Vault: The Wide Range of Available Functions in SAP

You don’t have to go treasure hunting on your own. SAP Product Compliance Applications do the job with you. They are perfectly tailored to manage the required PFAS information on components and ingredients all the way down to the respective chemical substance or CAS number level. To do so, they process existing data and information:

  • The logistics integration enables product compliance data management on a material level considering different suppliers and manufacturers:
    • The material master contains information on the materials you procure, produce, store, and sell.
    • The bill of material (BOM) is a list of parts, items, assemblies and other components required to create your product.
    • The vendor master data stores the vendors that supply your company.
    • The purchasing info records connect purchased materials with vendors.
    • The source lists and approved manufacturer part lists specify the allowed sources of a (manufacturer part) material for a certain plant and period.
  • The possibility to connect to existing business processes of other areas such as sales and distribution, purchasing, manufacturing, and product development, facilitates the cross-functional availability and reporting of compliance information.

Make Use of the Vault: SAP Product Compliance Applications

Over the years, SAP’s product compliance solutions evolved, changed, and expanded.

Officially they are called SAP S/4HANA for product compliance, SAP Product and REACH Compliance, and SAP Product Safety.

Unofficially old terms like EHSM and EH&S have stuck around. Some habits are hard to break! Go deeper with our Overview and History of SAP Product Compliance Applications or browse the SAP Product Compliance Community.

The Central Logic

The core entity is the compliance data object (CDO) - like a material in the material master. The object stores everything: the compliance information, composition, supplier listings, relevant documents, and specifications.

The core challenge is reacting to changes. We are talking about new legal obligations like PFAS regulations, list updates like in REACH and RoHS, or product structure changes due to new suppliers and the redesign of your product. Reacting to any of those changes is crucial. You want to avoid a one-time exercise and instead aspire to a living system:

  • The Regulatory List Management handles all regulated substances for a specific regulation including possible exemptions.
  • The Release Management ensures reliability and documentation of compliance information.
  • The Change Management detects changes in the product structure and triggers the recalculation of the compliance status.
  • Interfaces and exchange formats enable reporting and electronic data exchange (e.g. IMDS, PSN, BOMcheck, IPC1752).

Realizing an Integrated PFAS Approach

PFAS is not a standalone topic. It makes sense to handle all product compliance topics like REACH-SVHCs, RoHS or PFAS in one integrated approach. SAP Product Compliance Applications are tailored to do just that. They execute checks against regulatory lists based on substances in your products including assemblies and supplier parts as defined in your BOMs.

OECD PFAS List And Other Regulatory Lists in Your SAP System:

 OECD PFAS Compliance Check for a Product in Your SAP System:

Remember, there is no IF, only a WHEN when it comes to PFAS regulations, substitutions, and phase-outs. Even if you are not affected now, you will be in the future. This means you may be confronted with not one, but several PFAS lists.

Bonus: Our strategic partner Yordas, an expert on chemical regulatory data, provides regulatory lists and PFAS substance identification without you having to stay on top of updated or new lists that might be published by the EPA, ECHA, or other authorities.

Extend the Vault: Product Compliance Collaboration

Recognizing the increasing amount of time and resources our customers are spending to fill compliance data gaps, we have developed opesus Product Compliance Collaboration (PCC).

opesus PCC is a central hub designed to support collaboration with suppliers, service providers, customers, authorities, and business units within your own company. It leverages your single source of truth with native integration into SAP product compliance applications. The tool is configurable for new upcoming reporting requirements.

The bottom line: For a topic as big as PFAS, it makes sense to start with what you already have. You can unlock your SAP ERP data treasury with SAP Product Compliance Applications to use existing information and stay on top of data changes. Stay tuned for our upcoming blog post in this series to discover how to gather missing compliance information with an integrated, highly automated, and auditable Product Compliance Collaboration solution.

entry.title: EWM: Handling Unit Print in Outbound
entry.content:
Hi all,

in our scenario, we pick whole HUs with mobile device from storage bin and post them to GI-Zone (Source HU = Destination HU). The picked HUs are nested.

Our requirement is that with confirmation of picking task (posting to GI-Zone), labels are printed for all HUs (main and sub HUs).
I tried to set up different condition records in /SCWM/PRHU6, but so far, only main HU is printed.

Can you advice how to set up the system, that all HU-Labels (main and sub HU) are printed?

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: Media/MIME config in Vocabulary-based SEGW project
entry.content: Refresh Cache from gateway system and try. It should work.

entry.title: How to reopen a closed contract in Ariba CMS
entry.content:
Hello All,

When I try to reopen a closed contract in Ariba with Amendment of type amendment and also with type republish I am getting proxy error as below. Please suggest a resolution to reopen the closed contract.

Proxy Error

The proxy server received an invalid response from an upstream server.
The proxy server could not handle the request

Reason: Error reading from remote server

entry.title: Mismatch between Stock position in Inventory Active data table and Reference point table
entry.content:
Hi,

For a very few plant material combinations, the stock quantity in Inventory Active data table in BW is not matching with Reference point table. The stock position between S4 and BW Inventory DSO/Active table foe these cases are in sync but there is a discrepancy with reference point table of the same Inventory DSO.

Kindly suggest on the possible root cause of this.

entry.title: Re: SAP Omnichannel Sales Transfer and Audit a new sales transaction validation industry cloud solut
entry.content:
Thank you, Oliver, for your answer.

I am looking for possible solutions for information exchange between POS systems and SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition without the IS-Retail industry solution. Do I understand correctly that SAP Omnichannel Sales Transfer and Audit transfers documents in IDOC format to SAP S/4HANA and this is a fixed list of document types?

Is it possible to make your own modifications (custom development) to SAP OSTA in the part that is responsible for transferring documents in customized json format to the SAP S/4HANA system?

entry.title: Re: valuated stock in transit for scope item BDN
entry.content: thanks

entry.title: Re: New End User File Upload in SAP Analytics Cloud QRC3 2024
entry.content:
Hi @gerd_schoeffl 

When trying to migrate from custom widget to this new solution, I noticed a challenge for those file uploads using Pivot Settings, more specifically the "Pivot Column Start" allowed users to dynamically upload an x nr. of periods.
In the new File Upload Starter & related the SAC upload job wrangling I only see a way to pivot a fixed nr. of columns. In our customer use case, users could upload at least 7 and maximum 18 forward looking periods. Is there any known solution or workaround for this?

entry.title: Re: Entering SAP Signavio certification
entry.content: Hi Daniel, thanks for your question. There are currently no certification workshops in the pipeline from our side. However, please feel free to take a look at our event offerings on  signavio.com/events to find helpful events covering topics on the Business Process Manager.

entry.title: Re: My Object Page V4 is empty , except Header. Even i ca...
entry.content: type: #LINEITEM_REFERENCE, that is to reference the child entity. you only have one entity, it is not for you. you need field group annotation.

entry.title: Re: po output type is blank in ME23N but triggered in change mode ME22N

entry.title: Sessions TechEd Virtual VS Live
entry.content:
Hello Community! 

The Teched Sessions are available! 

I'm not sure yet if I can participate the live event in Florida. But, If I had all the time in the world, I’d attend every session, both virtual and live, because there’s so much great content. But I’m really busy, and I can’t spend four full days watching everything.

With that in mind,
what’s the best way for you to make the most of the live event and virtual?
How should I focus my time to get the best experience, the session live will replicate the virtual ones?

Thank you,

Sebastiano

entry.title: Need to add description when creating a new open item reference
entry.content:
Why do we need to add an "Open Item Reference Description" when creating a new open item reference?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Need to add description when creating a new open item...
entry.content:
A description has to be entered for your posting procedure as well as the year to which the procedure refers. The year is used only for grouping the open item reference and provides you with a reference to search by.

Please refer to the Help Document mentioned below for more information:

General Ledger Accounts Quick Guide | SAP Help Portal

entry.title: Re: Aborted TWB-Job SMT_BATCH_EXECUTE
entry.content:
The error message states that the job passed the time window to be able to start, meaning that all background work processes were occupied during that time period.

You need to increase the background work processes number or speed the overall system performance to let all other jobs to finish faster and free the resource to run other jobs on queue.

entry.title: Re: Massachusetts - Supplemental vs Base Wages
entry.content:
Hi Alicia,

Are you using BSI SaaS? We're on transition to SaaS version and noticed that supplemental tax amount is not the same as on OP during the testing. We'd just created a ticket to BSI, but your issue seems the same as ours.

 

Regards,

Euna

entry.title: Re: SAC Lookup-Table - IF Statement
entry.content:
Hello @SAC_Newbie 

I'm not a Data Action Code expert, either 😉 I just would like to give some hints to think about...

What I miss in your example is the a) the Date and b) if you want to have the new information in a new model dimension of Dataset A or as a property in the Article dimension.

However, even on the same date, I guess you can have more than 1 record, and only the sum of the price will reflect the proper interval you want to derive? So which of the e.g. 3 records, which return the total price 15 should get the Assignment information?

I think you should - and maybe this is easier - create new records, Article per Date - without Price - but one separate dimension with an indicator (dimension 'contains assignment' = "Y") and the Assignment dimension.

BR, Martin

entry.title: Re: SAP Omnichannel Sales Transfer and Audit a new sales transaction validation industry cloud solut
entry.content:
The POS Inbound interface in S/4 is based on SOAP and no longer uses IDOC formats. you can see details in the documentation.
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/9905622a5c1f49ba84e9076fc83a9c2c/6e24835edb104565bcbe34c075c34ad0.html?locale=en-US&q=Retail%20POS%20inbound
Of course you can take the messages from OSTA and transform them and import them in your preferred way into a non-retail system. The same is also necessary for the masterdata. OSTA expects a defined format to come from S/4 Retail. 
All custom development cannot be done within OSTA, but can only happen outside in a middleware.

entry.title: Re: Task 2 - CDS View Entity Associations ( August Developer Challenge )
entry.content: Hello,

entry.title: Re: Source DMIS 2011 SP27 - repl. server DMIS 2011 SP16 c...
entry.content:
Hello,

An SLT system on DMIS 2011 SP16 supports a source system on DMIS 2011 SP13-SP16. 

Best Regards,
Michael
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: ALV CONTROLL TREE
entry.content:
You may use the protected method GET_INDEX_FROM_NODE_KEY in CL_ALV_TREE_BASE (super class of CL_GUI_ALV_TREE_SIMPLE). To use a protected method, you may inherit the class and create another method which calls this protected method e.g. below code.

Don't forget to declare your instance TYPE REF TO lcl_gui_alv_tree_simple instead of cl_gui_alv_tree_simple.

 

CLASS lcl_gui_alv_tree_simple DEFINITION INHERITING FROM cl_gui_alv_tree_simple.
  PUBLIC SECTION.
    METHODS constructor
      IMPORTING  VALUE(i_lifetime)            TYPE i       OPTIONAL
                 VALUE(i_parent)              TYPE REF TO cl_gui_container OPTIONAL
                 VALUE(i_shellstyle)          TYPE i       OPTIONAL
                 VALUE(i_node_selection_mode) TYPE i       DEFAULT cl_gui_column_tree=>node_sel_mode_single
                 VALUE(i_hide_selection)      TYPE as4flag OPTIONAL
                 VALUE(i_item_selection)      TYPE as4flag DEFAULT 'X'
                 VALUE(i_no_toolbar)          TYPE as4flag OPTIONAL
                 VALUE(i_no_html_header)      TYPE as4flag OPTIONAL
                 VALUE(i_print)               TYPE as4flag OPTIONAL
      EXCEPTIONS todo.

    METHODS get_index_from_node_key2
      IMPORTING  i_node_key TYPE lvc_nkey
      EXPORTING  e_index    TYPE lvc_index
      EXCEPTIONS node_not_found.
ENDCLASS.

CLASS lcl_gui_alv_tree_simple IMPLEMENTATION.
  METHOD constructor.
    super->constructor( EXPORTING  i_lifetime            = i_lifetime
                                   i_parent              = i_parent
                                   i_shellstyle          = i_shellstyle
                                   i_node_selection_mode = i_node_selection_mode
                                   i_hide_selection      = i_hide_selection
                                   i_item_selection      = i_item_selection
                                   i_no_toolbar          = i_no_toolbar
                                   i_no_html_header      = i_no_html_header
                                   i_print               = i_print
                        EXCEPTIONS cntl_error                  = 1
                                   cntl_system_error           = 2
                                   create_error                = 3
                                   lifetime_error              = 4
                                   illegal_node_selection_mode = 5
                                   failed                      = 6
                                   illegal_column_name         = 7 ).
    IF sy-subrc <> 0.
      " TODO
    ENDIF.
  ENDMETHOD.

  METHOD get_index_from_node_key2.
    get_index_from_node_key( EXPORTING  i_node_key     = i_node_key
                             IMPORTING  e_index        = e_index
                             EXCEPTIONS node_not_found = 1 ).
    IF sy-subrc = 1.
      RAISE node_not_found.
    ENDIF.
  ENDMETHOD.
ENDCLASS.

entry.title: Re: How to Use Custom Fields for Pricing in Sales Documents
entry.content:
Hi @kiran_kumar262,

In S/4HANA Public Cloud there is no USEREXIT_PRICING_PREPARE_TKOMK or similar BAdI available. Therefore it is recommended to fill the value of the custom field in sales document and pass it to pricing via the mentioned business scenario. Do you see any issue doing that?
If you want to set the field automatically in the sales document, you can use BAdIs SD_SLS_MODIFY_HEAD or SD_SLS_MODIFY_ITEM.

best regards,
Christian

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA for Product Compliance: doubts with a Sup...
entry.content: Thank you for your answers, Sebastian. As for my implementation, I'll give feedback in a few days.

entry.title: PowerDesigner "edit selection" button unresponsive in report editor
entry.content:
Hi all,

While working on an MMR report in #SAP PowerDesigner 16.7.7.0 (7536), the "edit selection" button for any previously-edited report elements with selections became unresponsive. I can add a section which will open the selection window as usual, but when I try to edit an existing report element the selection window does not open. Did I trigger some lockout setting by accident? Or could my file be corrupted? My previous solution (I encountered this once before) was to re-create the report, but I would prefer to keep the old one, as creating a new one takes a considerable amount of time.

I am relatively new to PowerDesigner, so any help is greatly appreciated 🙂

Thanks in advance!
